title: The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999
full_text: The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 राष्ट्री य स्वकपरायणता, प्रमस्तियष्क् घात, मानसिक मंदता औरबहु-नि:शक्तयताग्रस्ति व्य्क्ति् कल्यातण न्यातसअधिनियम, 1999 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199944 Act Number: 44 Enactment Date: 1999-12-30 Act Year: 1999 Short Title: The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 Hindi Title: राष्ट्री य स्वकपरायणता, प्रमस्तियष्क् घात, मानसिक मंदता औरबहु-नि:शक्तयताग्रस्ति व्य्क्ति् कल्यातण न्यातसअधिनियम, 1999 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a body at the National level for the Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment Department: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Enforcement Date: 30-12-1999 Last Updated: 14-01-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL TRUST FOR WELFARE OF PERSONS WITH AUTISM, CEREBRAL PALSY, MENTAL RETARDATION AND MULTIPLE DISABILITY CHAPTER III OBJECTS OF THE TRUST CHAPTER IV POWERS AND DUTIES OF THE BOARD CHAPTER V PROCEDURE FOR REGISTRATION CHAPTER VI LOCAL LEVEL COMMITTEES CHAPTER VII ACCOUNTABILITY AND MONITORING CHAPTER VIII FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER IX MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Constitution of the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disability, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Term of office of Chairperson and Members, meeting of Board, etc. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Resignation of Chairperson and Members. Section 6. Disqualifications. Section 7. Vacation of office by Members. Section 8. Chief Executive Officer and staff of Trust. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Vacancies in Board not to invalidate acts, etc. Section 10. Objects of Trust. Section 11. Powers and duties of Board. Section 12. Procedure for registration. Show Related Subordinates Section 13. Constitution of local level committees. Section 14. Appointment for guardianship. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Duties of guardian. Section 16. Guardian to furnish inventory and annual accounts. Section 17. Removal of guardian. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Accountability. Section 19. Monitoring. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Annual general meeting. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Grants by the Central Government. Section 22. Fund. Section 23. Budget. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Accounts and audit. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Annual report. Show Related Subordinates Section 26. Authentication of orders, etc. Section 27. Returns and information. Section 28. Power of Central Government to issue directions. Section 29. Power of Central Government to supersede Board. Section 30. Exemption from tax on income. Section 31. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 32. Chairperson, Members and officers of Trust to be public servants. Section 33. Delegation. Section 34. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 35. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 36. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament.
